suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a multi-chain cache convention: per-token caches should use `${chainId}:${address.toLowerCase()}` keys instead of address-only keys.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Scrutiny review for curve-multichain-support found src/config.ts uses chain-aware keys while src/curve.ts symbolCache is address-only, creating edge-case risk for same-address tokens across chains.

rejectedObservations.observation: createCurve() convention was already present in AGENTS.md and skill guidance before implementation
